sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong gum Topa ko in, Hong thupiak ngai in
ke’n hong gum ding kong pai h i;
Hi hi, zingsang mateng ompih ding,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lam-et bei teembaw nasemte, lungsim thaneem hi;
Topa’ sapna aw za uha, Lungdam khin uh

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tuipi tung huihnun phat lai-ah, Teembaw tum dek hi;
A gum ding Jesuh va pai a, Lungman damsak

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Nang hong it manin hong kum a, Nang tang ding si hi;
Siatna pai-in a thu-um in, Inn na tung
